name: Grilled Fish with Winter Root Slaw
recipeIngredient: 2 small sea bass, cleaned, gutted, and scaled
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the fish.
2. Combine 1/4 cup olive oil with salt and pepper to season each slit in the flesh of the sea bass on either side of the fish.
3. In a bowl, toss together julienned carrot, parsnips, and celery root, toasted walnuts roughly chopped, chervil leaves (plus extra sprigs for garnish), 2 tablespoons champagne vinegar, and 1 teaspoon walnut oil. Season to taste.
4. Light grill or pre-heat broiler.
5. Grill the fish for 5 minutes, moving them around a few times to prevent sticking.
6. Fillet the fish by starting at the top fin; the meat should separate easily from the bones as you work your way down the fish.
7. Serve two fillets on each of two dinner plates and garnish with chervil sprigs.
Yield: 2 servings
